circuits.name: 28VDC Essential Bus Distribution
circuits.description: Standard 28VDC essential bus with contactor, current limiter, and distribution to 4 circuit breaker protected loads.
circuits.notes: ATA 24-31 essential bus. Contactor K1 closes on battery master. Each load protected by individual CB. Ensure ground return wire gauge matches load current.

circuits.name: ARINC 429 Transmitter/Receiver Pair
circuits.description: ARINC 429 unidirectional bus connection from a transmitting LRU to a receiving LRU with proper shielding and termination.
circuits.notes: Single-ended receiver. Terminate at receiver with 75-86 Ohm differential. Shield grounded at single point (transmitter end). Do not create ground loops.

circuits.name: E-Stop Safety Circuit (IEC 62061 Cat 3)
circuits.description: Dual-channel E-stop with safety relay, monitoring contacts, and forced-guided relay for SIL2/Cat3 compliance.
circuits.notes: Dual-channel design for Cat3 / SIL2. Cross-monitoring via K2B/K3B. Both channels must open independently. Annunciate via discrete output to FCC.

circuits.name: 28VDC Battery Charge/Discharge Monitor
circuits.description: Battery monitoring with shunt-based current sensing, voltage divider, and discrete over/under-voltage warning output.
circuits.notes: Shunt R1 in series with battery negative. Monitor LRU reads differential voltage. Discrete output goes LO on fault. Wire shunt sense leads as twisted pair, separate from power.

circuits.name: 3-Phase 115VAC Bus Distribution
circuits.description: 400Hz 3-phase AC bus with current transformer sensing and 3-pole CB protection for AC loads.
circuits.notes: 400Hz AC. Phase rotation A-B-C. CT secondary must not be open-circuited under load. CB must break all three phases simultaneously.

circuits.name: Discrete Input Signal Conditioning
circuits.description: 28VDC discrete input with pull-up resistor, optical isolation, and de-bounce filter for interfacing aircraft-level signals to LRU logic.
circuits.notes: 28V HI = logic 1. Pull-up to 28VDC. Opto provides galvanic isolation and noise immunity. De-bounce filter: 10ms. Meets DO-160G Section 16.
